textByHashes.5f6d4edb1ce956f476ca22216fab4b97b8efc760: With many occupants over the years...
textByHashes.11b11acca0238ce455359f6b86353661c7b1a2eb: It started life as an outpost...
textByHashes.d2521f0cf1a29d81dc7968a29799bd6608721652: ... its sole purpose being to see invading armies...
textByHashes.c0cee9a7495cf2b110414d028631978a4811b7a6: ... before they saw the city of Ardougne.
